title: IBB Shuttle Service — Trusted Premium Shuttle Service in Thailand
description: Premium private shuttle booking platform in Thailand. Airport transfers, leisure travel, and corporate transportation with professional drivers and modern vehicles.
hero_tagline: Premium Shuttle Service, Designed Around You
about_title: Premium Private Shuttle Service Designed Around You
about_description: IBB Shuttle Service is a premium private shuttle booking platform focused on safety, flexibility, and reliability. We provide whole-vehicle rentals, carefully selecting professional drivers and modern vehicles to ensure a seamless travel experience.
about_safe_desc: All drivers are fully verified, and vehicles undergo regular inspections to ensure the highest level of safety.
about_247_desc: Enjoy flexible booking with reliable service available around the clock for your convenience.
about_premium_desc: Our modern fleet and professional drivers deliver a premium travel experience every time.
about_customer_desc: Our dedicated support team is ready to assist you before, during, and after your journey.
services_airport_desc: Reliable airport transfers to and from all major airports in Thailand
services_airport_alt: IBB Airport Shuttle Service - Premium airport transfer with professional driver
services_leisure_desc: Comfortable transportation for sightseeing and vacation trips
services_leisure_alt: IBB Leisure Travel Service - Comfortable premium transportation for vacation trips
services_corporate_desc: Professional business transportation with punctuality guaranteed
services_corporate_alt: IBB Corporate Travel Service - Professional business transportation with luxury vehicles
features_convenience_desc: Focused on comfort throughout every journey.
features_safety_desc: Committed to the highest safety standards for our customers.
features_premium_desc: A fleet of clean, modern vehicles ready to serve you.
pricing_description: Zone-based pricing with no hidden fees. Price varies by route and vehicle type. Contact us for a personalized quote.
pricing_car_desc: Perfect for solo travelers or small groups
pricing_van_desc: Ideal for families and medium groups
pricing_bus_desc: Best for large groups and tours
booking_title: Book Your Premium Shuttle with Confidence
booking_description: Enjoy reliable service, flexible scheduling, and dedicated support before, during, and after your journey.
footer_copyright: IBB Shuttle Service. All Rights Reserved.
pp_title: IBB Shuttle Service — Premium Shuttle Pricing in Thailand
pp_description: Complete pricing for premium shuttle service across Thailand. Airport transfers, intercity routes, hourly and daily rentals with professional drivers.
pp_hero_tagline: Transparent zone-based pricing with no hidden fees
pp_note: All prices in Thai Baht (THB). Prices may vary during festival seasons and peak periods.
ptr_title: IBB Shuttle Service — Business Partners Program
ptr_description: Join our premium network of travel agencies, hotels, and corporate partners. Earn competitive commissions with Thailand's most trusted shuttle service.
ptr_hero_desc: Join our premium network of travel agencies, hotels, and corporate partners. Earn competitive commissions while providing your clients with Thailand's most trusted transportation service.
ptr_benefit1_desc: Earn attractive commission rates on every successful booking referral.
ptr_benefit2_desc: Streamlined payment process with dedicated partner wallet.
ptr_benefit3_desc: Dedicated account manager and 24/7 partner support line.
ptr_benefit4_desc: Track bookings, earnings, and performance in real-time.
ptr_type1_desc: Tour operators and travel agencies seeking reliable ground transportation.
ptr_type2_desc: Companies requiring regular executive and employee transportation.
ptr_cta_note: Application review typically takes 3-5 business days.
trk_title: IBB Shuttle Service — Track Your Vehicle
trk_description: Track your shuttle vehicle location in real-time. Enter your booking number to see live GPS position, driver details, and estimated arrival time.
trk_subtitle: Enter your booking number to see your vehicle's real-time location.
